query.name: listByUser
query.sql: SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.name, a.is_default, a.sort_order, a.created_at, a.updated_at FROM ml_account a WHERE a.user_id = ${@user_id} ORDER BY a.is_default DESC, a.sort_order ASC, a.id ASC

query.name: getDefault
query.sql: SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.name, a.is_default, a.sort_order, a.created_at, a.updated_at FROM ml_account a WHERE a.user_id = ${@user_id} AND a.is_default = 1 LIMIT 1

collisionSql.where: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_account WHERE user_id = ${@user_id} AND name = TRIM(${@name}))

sqls.executeSql: INSERT INTO ml_account (user_id, name, is_default, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (${@user_id}, TRIM(${@name}), 0, COALESCE(${@sort_order}, 100), NOW(), NOW())

collisionSql.where: NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_account WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id})
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_account a2 WHERE a2.user_id = ${@user_id} AND a2.name = TRIM(${@name}) AND a2.id <> ${@id})
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_account WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id})

sqls.executeSql: UPDATE ml_account SET is_default = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = ${@user_id}

collisionSql.where: NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_account WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id})

collisionSql.message: 该账户下已有流水，无法删除

collisionSql.where: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ml_account WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id} AND is_default = 1)
collisionSql.message: 默认资金账户不可删除

sqls.executeSql: DELETE FROM ml_account WHERE id = ${@id} AND user_id = ${@user_id}
